mechanics.excerpt: SOCIETY AND CULTURI stored on the card itselt; neavily encrypted and subject t0 rigor- ous security checks Such cards cost ten percent of their certi fied value t0 keep that way: The Federated Suns relies heavily on the Federated News Services and Federated Independent Broadcasters to keep the nation informed: the main broadcast- er in the Lyran Alliance the Commonwealth Press division of the Donegal Broadcasting Company: Their relative openness comes at price however; both nations suffer more than other realms under the glaring cameras of scandal-vid producers_ collection of loosely organized principalities_ the Free Worlds League defies strict, nationwide controls on the press_ What one duchy tolerates, its neighbor might heavily restrict The usual rules tend get bent; however; Nnen dealing with information that neighboring (read: rival) League region might find politically sensitive_ In such cases; duchy might well vio Iate own standing policies just to see its rival squirm, Learning to walk that fine line puts intense pressure on the news media Even scandal vids take care how they report the news in the Free Worlds League, though they usually get their stories across with the maximum leeway: Being newsperson the Free Worlds League reportedly one of the most nerve racking professions in the Inner Sphere, Not surprisingly; the Combine and tne Capellan Confederation exert greater control over their respective news services.
